description: Composition Mustard printed kurta made of Tussar silk/ cotton, has a mandarin collar and a half buttoned placket, long sleeves and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Dry clean only fabindia specialises in natural, craft-based contemporary pieces, while also providing rural craft persons a platform to use traditional dyeing and fabric printing techniques. Capturing the essence of Indian roots, crafted with a focus on the traditional, this kurta sets the tone for an all-new ethnic trend. Wear this with denims or cotton pants. Model statistics The product is a size 40 on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
